name: Sequential Workflow Pipeline
description: Deterministic sequential agent pipeline for document processing. Demonstrates fixed-order execution with per-step error handling — when you need reliability over autonomy.

resources.name: AgentCore Runtime
resources.description: Managed container runtime for the pipeline agent

resources.name: AgentCore Endpoint
resources.description: Public endpoint for invoking the agent

resources.name: IAM Role + 5 Policies
resources.description: Bedrock invoke, ECR pull, CloudWatch logs, CloudWatch metrics, X-Ray tracing

pattern_description: Deterministic sequential pipeline. A fixed sequence of agent steps where each step has defined inputs and outputs. Unlike dynamic routing (supervisor), this guarantees execution order. Use this for document processing, data pipelines, or any workflow requiring reliability over autonomy.

parameters.name: container_image_uri
parameters.description: ECR image URI for the agent container
